seoTitle: Cape Jaffa vs Cape Jervis — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Jaffa and Cape Jervis. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Jaffa vs Cape Jervis: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Jaffa and Cape Jervis.
heading: Cape Jaffa vs Cape Jervis — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Jaffa, South Australia and Cape Jervis, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Jervis has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Cape Jaffa (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Jaffa or Cape Jervis safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Jaffa has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Cape Jervis scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Jaffa scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Jervis scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Jaffa or Cape Jervis?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Jervis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
